message:
feat(og): add Twitter card images and fix async params / test strictness

Add dedicated twitter-image.tsx route handlers for bundles, bundle
detail, prompt detail, user profile, and workflows pages. These
provide optimized 1200x600 summary_large_image cards for Twitter/X
sharing, complementing the existing OpenGraph images.

Fix Next.js 15 async params pattern in bundle and user OG image
routes — params is now a Promise that must be awaited. Also fix
Satori rendering of user profile stats by wrapping text labels in
their own flex spans with explicit gap, preventing Satori from
collapsing inline text nodes.

Tighten test type safety: replace @ts-ignore with @ts-expect-error
(which errors if the suppression becomes unnecessary), and remove
redundant @ts-ignore comments where type assertions already handle
the mismatch. Remove stale framer-motion mocks from transcript
component tests (no longer needed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,85 @@ +import { ImageResponse } from "next/og"; +import { bundles } from "@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts/bundles"; + +export const runtime = "edge"; +export const alt = "Prompt Bundles - Curated collections for agentic coding"; +export const size = { + width: 1200, + height: 600, +}; +export const contentType = "image/png"; + +export default function BundlesTwitterImage() { + const bundleCount = bundles.length; + const totalPrompts = bundles.reduce((sum, b) => sum + b.promptIds.length, 0); + + return new ImageResponse( + ( +
+
+ {"Jeffrey's Prompts"} +
+ +
+
+ Prompt Bundles +
+
+ Curated collections of related prompts. Install all prompts in a bundle with a single command. +
+
+ +
+ {bundleCount} bundles + · + {totalPrompts} prompts + jeffreysprompts.com +
+
+ ), + size + ); +}

@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@ +import { ImageResponse } from "next/og"; +import { workflows } from "@jeffreysprompts/core/prompts"; + +export const runtime = "edge"; +export const alt = "Workflow Builder - Chain prompts into powerful workflows"; +export const size = { + width: 1200, + height: 600, +}; +export const contentType = "image/png"; + +export default function WorkflowsTwitterImage() { + const workflowCount = workflows.length; + + return new ImageResponse( + ( +
+
+ {"Jeffrey's Prompts"} +
+ +
+
+ Workflow Builder +
+
+ Chain prompts together into powerful multi-step workflows. Export as markdown for any AI assistant. +
+
+ +
+ {workflowCount} curated workflows + jeffreysprompts.com +
+
+ ), + size + ); +}
